nasb.text: However, they did not listen, but stiffened their neck like their fathers, who did not believe in the Lord their God.

esv.text: But they would not listen, but were stubborn, as their fathers had been, who did not believe in the Lord their God.

cnv.text: 可是他們不聽從，反而硬著自己的頸項，好像他們的祖先，不信服耶和華他們的　神；

ccb.text: 但他们充耳不闻，像他们祖先一样顽固不化，不信靠他们的上帝耶和华，
